title: Nesphostylis bracteata
taxonomy: Nesphostylis bracteata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, which is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as legumes. It belongs to the subfamily Faboideae, which includes many species of beans, peas, and other legumes. The genus Nesphostylis is a small one, with only a few species recognized, all of which are native to tropical regions of Asia. Nesphostylis bracteata is found in Southeast Asia, where it grows as a climber or shrub in the understory of tropical forests. The exact classification of Nesphostylis bracteata may be subject to revision as new research and phylogenetic studies become available.
